_.discard_changes_explain: Unotshintsho olungagcinwanga. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuzilahla kwaye ushiye isikrini?
_.storage_is_encrypted: Indawo yakho yokugcina inoguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo. Igama lokugqitha liyafuneka ukuyisusa ngokuntsonkotha.
_.qr_custom_input_button: Cofa izihlandlo ezili-10 ukufaka igalelo lesiqhelo

azteco.errorBeforeRefeem: Ngaphambi kokuba uhlawule, kufuneka uqale wongeze i-wallet ye-Bitcoin.
azteco.errorSomething: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle. Ingaba le vawutsha isasebenza?
azteco.successMessage: Ivawutsha ikhululwe ngempumelelo! Imali yakho kufuneka ifike kwingxowa yakho ye-Bitcoin kungekudala.
azteco.title: Khulula ivawutsha ye-Azte.co

lnd.refill_create: Ukuze uqhubeke, nceda yenza ingxowa ye-Bitcoin yokugcwalisa.
lnd.sameWalletAsInvoiceError: Awukwazi ukuhlawula i-invoyisi ngengxowa oyisebenzisile ukudala leyo invoyisi.
lnd.title: Lawula iMali

lndViewInvoice.please_pay_between_and: Nceda hlawula phakathi kwe-{min} kunye ne-{max}
lndViewInvoice.wasnt_paid_and_expired: Le invoyisi ayihlawulwanga kwaye iphelelwe lixesha.
lndViewInvoice.refund_deferred: Imali ayikabuyiseleki okwangoku. Zama kwakhona emva kokuba i-timelock ye-swap iphelelwe lixesha.
lndViewInvoice.notification_claim_body: {walletLabel}: cofa ukuze ufumane intlawulo yakho ye-Lightning engenayo.
lndViewInvoice.notification_refund_body: {walletLabel}: cofa ukuze ubuyisele intlawulo yakho ye-Lightning ebambekileyo.

plausibledeniability.create_password_explanation: Iphasiwedi yendawo yakho yokugcina yenkohliso akumele ifane neyendawo yakho engundoqo yokugcina.
plausibledeniability.help: Phantsi kweemeko unokunyanzeliswa ukuba uchaze iphasiwedi. Ukugcina iimali zakho zikhuselekile, BlueWallet inokudala enye indawo yokugcina enoguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo, ngephasiwedi eyahlukileyo. Phantsi kwefuthe, ungayityhila le phasiwedi kumntu wesithathu. Ukuba ifakwe kwi-BlueWallet, iya kuvula indawo ‘yobuxoki’ yokugcina. Oku kuya kubonakala kufanelekile kumntu wesithathu kodwa kuya kugcina ngasese indawo yakho engundoqo yokugcina iimali ikhuselekile.
plausibledeniability.help2: Igumbi lokugcina elitsha liza kusebenza ngokupheleleyo, kwaye unako ukugcina okunye ‘ + ‘lxabiso elincinci apho likhangeleka ngakumbi.
plausibledeniability.password_should_not_match: Iphasiwedi yendawo yakho yokugcina yenkohliso akumele ifane neyendawo yakho engundoqo yokugcina.
plausibledeniability.title: Ukuphika

pleasebackup.ask: Ingaba uyigcinile i-backup phrase yengxowa yakho? Le backup phrase iyafuneka ukufikelela kwimali yakho ukuba ulahlekelwa sesi sixhobo. Ngaphandle kwe-backup phrase, imali yakho iya kulahleka unaphakade.
pleasebackup.text:
Nceda thabatha umzuzu ubhale eli binzana lokukhumbula kwiphepha.
Leli libinzana lakho lokuqwalasela kwaye unokulisebenzisa ukubuyisela ingxowa.
pleasebackup.text_lnd: Nceda gcina le backup yengxowa. Ikuvumela ukuba ubuyisele ingxowa xa ulahlekelwa.
pleasebackup.title: Ingxowa yakho idaliwe.

receive.bip47_explanation: Ii-payment codes yidilesi yendalo iphela ekugwema ukutyhilwa kweedilesi zengxowa yakho. Iinkonzo azizukuyixhasa zonke.

send.provided_address_is_invoice: Le dilesi ibonakala iyi-Lightning invoyisi. Nceda, yiya kwingxowa yakho ye-Lightning ukwenza intlawulo yale invoyisi.
send.create_this_is_hex: Le yi-hex yentengiselwano yakho, ityikityiwe ilungele ukukhutshelwa kumnatha.
send.details_add_recc_rem_all_alert_descripti: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukususa bonke abamkeli?
send.please_complete_recipient_details: Nceda phelelisa iinkcukacha zomamkeli #{number} phambi kokongeza umamkeli omtsha.
send.details_adv_full_sure: Uqinisekile ufuna ukusebenzisa yonke ibhalansi yengxowa yakho kule ntengiselwano?
send.details_adv_full_sure_frozen: Uqinisekile ufuna ukusebenzisa yonke ibhalansi yengxowa yakho kule ntengiselwano? Nceda qaphela ukuba iimali ezikhenkceziweyo zikhutshelwe ngaphandle.
send.details_amount_field_is_less_than_minimu: Isixa esikhankanyiweyo sincinci kakhulu. Nceda faka isixa esikhulu kuneesats ezi-500.
send.details_scan_hint: Cofa kabini ukuskena okanye ukungenisa indawo yokuya
send.details_total_exceeds_balance_frozen: Isixa sokuthumela sidlula ibhalansi ekhoyo. Nceda qaphela ukuba iicoins ezi-frozen aziqukwa.
send.details_wallet_before_tx: Phambi kokudala i-transaction, kufuneka uqale wongeze ingxowa ye-Bitcoin.
send.fee_replace_minvb: Ireyithi yentlawulo iyonke (satoshi nge-vByte) ofuna ukuyihlawula kufuneka iphezulu kune-{min} sat/vByte.
send.permission_camera_message: Sifuna imvume yakho yokusebenzisa ikhamera yakho.
send.psbt_this_is_psbt: Le yiNtengiselwano ye-Bitcoin Etyikitywe Ngokuyinxenye (PSBT). Nceda gqibezela ukuyityikitya ngengxowa yakho yehardware.
send.qr_error_no_qrcode: Asikwazanga kufumana iQR Code esebenzayo kumfanekiso okhethiweyo. Qiniseka ukuba umfanekiso uqulethe iQR Code kuphela kwaye akukho omnye umxholo onjengetekisi okanye amaqhosha.
send.cant_send_to_silentpayment_adress: Le ngxowa ayikwazi ukuthumela kwiidilesi ze-SilentPayment
send.cant_send_to_bip47: Le ngxowa ayikwazi ukuthumela kwii-BIP47 payment codes
send.cant_find_bip47_notification: Yongeza le Khowudi yeNtlawulo kuqala kwiqhakamshelo

settings.about_free: I-BlueWallet yiprojekthi yasimahla kwaye yi-open-source. Yenziwe ngabasebenzisi be-Bitcoin.
settings.block_explorer_invalid_custom_url: I-URL enikiweyo ayisebenzi. Nceda faka i-URL esebenzayo eqala nge-http:// okanye https://.
settings.about_selftest_electrum_disabled: Uvavanyo lwakho aluphumeleli kuMode wokungaqhagamshelwanga we-Electrum. Nceda yivale imode yokungaqhagamshelwanga uzame kwakhona.
settings.about_selftest_ok: Zonke iimvavanyo zangaphakathi zigqitywe ngempumelelo. Ingxowa isebenza kakuhle.
settings.privacy_temporary_screenshots_instructio: Ukhuseleko lokuthatha iskrini luyakucinywa okwexeshana, kuvumela ii-screenshot kunye nokurekhoda iskrini. Ukhuseleko luya kuvuselelwa ngokuzenzekelayo xa uvala uvule kwakhona i-BlueWallet.
settings.biometrics_no_longer_available: Izicwangciso zesixhobo sakho zitshintshile kwaye azisahambelani nezicwangciso zokhuseleko ezikhethiweyo kwiapp. Nceda yenza kwakhona i-biometrics okanye i-passcode, emva koko uphinde uqalise iapp ukusebenzisa olu tshintsho.
settings.biom_10times: Uzamile ukufaka iphasiwedi yakho amaxesha ali-10. Ungathanda ukucwangcisa kwakhona indawo yokugcina? Oku kuza kususa zonke iingxowa kwaye kuvule ukugcina kwakho.
settings.biom_no_passcode: Isixhobo sakho asinayo i-passcode okanye i-biometrics ekhutshwayo. Ukuze uqhubeke, nceda misa i-passcode okanye i-biometric kwi-app yeZicwangciso.
settings.biom_remove_decrypt: Zonke iingxowa zakho ziya kususwa kwaye indawo yakho yokugcina iya kuvulwa. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuqhubeka?
settings.currency_fetch_error: Bekukho impazamo ngelixa ufumana ireyithi yemali ekhethiweyo.
settings.electrum_error_connect_tor: Ayikwazi ukuqhagamshela kwiseva ye-Electrum enikiweyo. Nceda qiniseka ukuba i-Orbot app iqhagamshelwe uzame kwakhona.
settings.electrum_offline_description: Xa ikhutshiwe, iingxowa zakho ze-Bitcoin azisayi kuzama ukufumana iibhalansi okanye ii-transactions.
settings.electrum_saved: Utshintsho lwakho lugciniwe ngempumelelo. Ukuvuselela i-BlueWallet kunokufuneka ukuze utshintsho lusebenze.
settings.set_electrum_server_as_default: Misa i-{server} njengeseva ye-Electrum eyenzelwe ngokwesiqhelo?
settings.set_lndhub_as_default: Misa i-{url} njengeseva ye-LNDhub eyenzelwe ngokwesiqhelo?
settings.electrum_preferred_server_description: Faka iseva ofuna ingxowa yakho iyisebenzisele zonke iindawo ze-Bitcoin. Xa imisiwe, ingxowa yakho iya kusebenzisa kuphela le seva ukujonga iibhalansi, ukuthumela ii-transactions, kunye nokufumana idatha yothungelwano. Qiniseka ukuba uyathemba le seva ngaphambi kokuyimisa.
settings.electrum_reset_to_default: Oku kuya kuvumela i-BlueWallet ikhethe ngokungenamthetho iseva kuluhlu lweeseva.
settings.electrum_reset_to_default_and_clear_hist: Cwangcisa kwakhona kweyokuqala kwaye usule imbali
settings.encrypt_decrypt_q: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuvula uGcino lwakho? Oku kuya kuvumela iingxowa zakho zifikelelwe ngaphandle kwephasiwedi.
settings.encrypt_storage_explanation_description_: Ukuvula uGuqulelo lokuGcina kongeza umsonto omtsha wokhuseleko kwi-app yakho ngokukhusela indlela edatha yakho igcinwa ngayo kwisixhobo sakho. Oku kwenza kube nzima kubantu ukufikelela kulwazi lwakho ngaphandle kwemvume.

Nangona kunjalo, kubalulekile ukwazi ukuba olu guqulelo lukhusela kuphela ukufikelela kwiingxowa zakho ezigcinwe kwi-keychain yesixhobo. Aluyibeki iphasiwedi okanye nasiphi na ukhuseleko olongezelelweyo kwiingxowa ngokwazo.
settings.set_as_preferred_electrum: Ukumisa i-{host}:{port} njengeseva ekhethwayo kuya kuvala ukuqhagamshela kwiseva ecetyiswayo ngokungenamthetho.
settings.encrypt_use_expl: I-{type} iya kusetyenziswa ukuqinisekisa isazisi sakho phambi kokwenza i-transaction, ukuvula, ukukhupha, okanye ukucima ingxowa.
settings.biometrics_fail: Ukuba i-{type} ayikhutshwanga, okanye yehluleka ukuvula, ungasebenzisa i-passcode yesixhobo sakho njengenye indlela.
settings.general_continuity_e: Xa ikhutshiwe, uya kukwazi ukujonga iingxowa ezikhethiweyo, kunye nee-transactions, usebenzisa ezinye izixhobo zakho ze-Apple iCloud eziqhagamshelweyo.
settings.language_isRTL: Ukuvuselela i-BlueWallet kuyafuneka ukuze ulwimi lujikeleze lusebenze.
settings.lightning_error_lndhub_uri_tor: I-LNDhub URI engasebenziyo. Nceda qiniseka ukuba i-Orbot app iqhagamshelwe uzame kwakhona.
settings.lightning_settings_explain: Ukuqhagamshela kwi-LND node yakho, nceda faka i-LNDhub kwaye ufake i-URL yayo apha kwizicwangciso. Nceda qaphela ukuba kuphela iingxowa eziyilwa emva kokugcina utshintsho ziya kuqhagamshela kwi-LNDhub ekhankanyiweyo.
settings.electrum_suggested_description: Xa iseva ekhethwayo ingamiselwanga, iseva ecetyiswayo iya kukhethwa ngokungenamthetho ukuze isetyenziswe.
settings.password_explain: Faka iphasiwedi oza kuyisebenzisa ukuvula indawo yakho yokugcina.
settings.privacy_quickactions_explanation: Bamba uchukumise iikoni ye-app ye-BlueWallet ukuze ukhawuleze ujonge ibhalansi yengxowa yakho.
settings.privacy_clipboard_explanation: Bonelela ngeendlela ezikhawulezayo ukuba idilesi okanye i-invoyisi ifumaneka kwi-clipboard yakho.
settings.privacy_do_not_track_explanation: Ulwazi lokusebenza nokuthembeka aluzukuthunyelwa ukuze luhlalutywe.
settings.push_notifications_explanation:
Ngokuvula izaziso, itoken yesixhobo sakho iya kuthunyelwa kwiseva, kunye needilesi zengxowa kunye nee-IDs ze-transactions zazo zonke iingxowa kunye nee-transactions ezenziwe emva kokuvula izaziso. Itoken yesixhobo isetyenziselwa ukuthumela izaziso, kwaye ulwazi lwengxowa lusivumela ukukwazisa malunga ne-Bitcoin engenayo okanye ukuqinisekiswa kwe-transactions.

Ulwazi kuphela kususela ekuvuleni kwakho izaziso luyathunyelwa—akukho nto ngaphambili iqokelelwayo.

Ukuvala izaziso kuya kususa lonke olu lwazi kwiseva. Ukongezelela, ukucima ingxowa kwi-app kukwakhulula ulwazi lwayo lwadibanayo kwiseva.
settings.total_balance_explanation: Bonisa ibhalansi epheleleyo yazo zonke iingxowa zakho kwiiwijethi zesikrini sakho sasekhaya.

notifications.would_you_like_to_receive_notifications: Ungathanda ukufumana izaziso xa ufumana iintlawulo ezingenayo?
notifications.permission_denied_message: Ulile imvume yokukuthumela izaziso. Ukuba ungathanda ukufumana izaziso, nceda zivule kwizicwangciso zesixhobo sakho.

transactions.cancel_explain: Siya kubeka kwakhona le ntengiselwano ngenye ekuhlawulayo nenentlawulo ephezulu. Oku kurhoxisa ngempumelelo intengiselwano yangoku. Oku kubizwa ngokuba yi-RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.transaction_loading_error: Bekukho ingxaki yokulayisha i-transaction. Nceda zama kwakhona kamva.
transactions.cpfp_exp: Siza kuyila enye i-transaction echitha i-transaction yakho engaqinisekiswanga. Intlawulo iyonke iya kuba phezulu kunentlawulo yokuqala ye-transaction, ngoko ke kufuneka i-mined ngokukhawuleza. Oku kubizwa ngokuba yi-CPFP—Child Pays for Parent.
transactions.enable_offline_signing: Le ngxowa ayisetyenziswa kunye nokutyikitya okungaqhagamshelwanga. Ungathanda ukukuvula ngoku?
transactions.open_url_error: Akukwazeki ukuvula ikhonkco ngebrawza yokuqala. Nceda tshintsha ibrawza yakho yokuqala uzame kwakhona.
transactions.rbf_explain: Siya kubeka kwakhona le ntengiselwano ngenye enentlawulo ephezulu ukuze imbiwe ngokukhawuleza. Oku kubizwa ngokuba yi-RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.watchOnlyWarningDescription: Lumka ngabaqhathi abadla ngokusebenzisa iingxowa ze-watch-only ukukhohlisa abasebenzisi. Ezi ngxowa azikuvumeli ukuba ulawule okanye uthumele imali; zikuvumela kuphela ukuba ujonge ibhalansi.
transactions.custom_fee_warning_description: Iintlawulo ezingaphantsi kwe-1 sat/vB ziyasebenza, kodwa azinakwaziswa ngenxa yemigaqo ye-node.

wallets.add_entropy_reset_message: Ukutshintsha uhlobo lwengxowa kuya kucwangcisa kwakhona i-entropy yangoku. Ufuna ukuqhubeka?
wallets.add_entropy_remain: {gen} iibytes ze-entropy eveliswayo. Iibytes ezi-{rem} eziseleyo ziya kufunyanwa kuMqondisi wamanani angekho mthethweni weNkqubo.
wallets.add_lndhub_error: Idilesi ye-node enikiweyo yi-LNDhub node engasebenziyo.
wallets.clipboard_bitcoin: Unedilesi ye-Bitcoin kwi-clipboard yakho. Ungathanda ukuyisebenzisa kwintengiselwano?
wallets.clipboard_lightning: Unayo i-invoyisi ye-Lightning kwi-clipboard yakho. Ungathanda ukuyisebenzisa kwintengiselwano?
wallets.details_del_wb_err: Isixa sebhalansi esinikiweyo asihambelani nebhalansi yale ngxowa. Nceda zama kwakhona.
wallets.details_del_wb_q: Le ngxowa inebhalansi. Phambi kokuqhubeka, nceda qaphela ukuba awunakukwazi ukubuyisa imali ngaphandle kwe-seed phrase yale ngxowa. Ukugwema ukususa ngengozi, nceda faka ibhalansi yengxowa yakho yee-satoshis ezi-{balance}.
wallets.import_error: Ayiphumelelanga ukungenisa. Nceda, uqiniseka ukuba idata ehlinzekiweyo iyasebenza.
wallets.import_explanation: Nceda faka amagama akho embewu, isitshixo sikawonke-wonke, i-WIF, okanye nayiphi na into onayo. I-BlueWallet iya kuzama ngandlela zonke ukuqikelela ifomati echanekileyo nokungenisa ingxowa yakho.
wallets.import_success_watchonly: Ingxowa yakho ingeniswe ngempumelelo. ISILUMKISO: Le yingxowa ye-watch-only, AWUKWAZI ukuchitha kuyo.
wallets.import_discovery_offline: I-BlueWallet ngoku ikwimo yokungaqhakamshelani. Kule mo, ayikwazi ukuqinisekisa ubukho bengxowa, ngoko ke kuya kufuneka ukhethe ngokwakho echanekileyo
wallets.import_derivation_subtitle: Faka i-derivation path yesiqhelo, kwaye siza kuzama ukufumana ingxowa yakho.
wallets.list_create_a_wallet_text:
Yi-free, kwaye ungenza
zininzi ngangoko ufuna.
wallets.list_empty_txs1_lightning: I-Lightning wallet kufuneka isetyenziselwe ii-transactions zakho zemihla ngemihla. Iintlawulo zicheap kakhulu kwaye isantya siphezulu kakhulu.
wallets.list_empty_txs2_lightning: Ukuze uqalise ukuyisebenzisa, cofa kwiManage Funds kwaye ugcwalise ibhalansi yakho.
wallets.no_ln_wallet_error: Phambi kokuhlawula i-Lightning invoyisi, kufuneka uqale wongeze i-Lightning wallet.
wallets.looks_like_bip38: Le ibonakala njengesitshixo sangasese esikhuselwe ngephasiwedi (BIP38).
wallets.select_no_bitcoin_exp: I-Bitcoin wallet iyafuneka ukugcwalisa ii-Lightning wallets. Nceda yenza okanye ungenise enye.
wallets.scan_import: Skena le QR code ukungenisa ingxowa yakho kwenye iapp.
wallets.write_down: Bhala phantsi kwaye ugcine ngokukhuselekileyo la magama. Wasebenzise ukubuyisela ingxowa yakho kamva.
wallets.copy_ln_url: Kopa kwaye ugcine ngokukhuselekileyo le URL ukubuyisela ingxowa yakho kamva.
wallets.copy_ln_public: Kopa kwaye ugcine ngokukhuselekileyo olu lwazi ukubuyisela ingxowa yakho kamva.
wallets.manage_wallets_search_placeholder: Khangela iingxowa, iidilesi, ii-transactions kunye nee-memos
wallets.details_delete_wallet_error_message: Bekukho ingxaki yokuqinisekisa ukuba le ngxowa isuswe kwizaziso—oku kungenxa yengxaki yothungelwano okanye uqhagamshelo olungalunganga. Ukuba uyaqhubeka, usenokufumana izaziso ze-transactions ezinxulumene nale ngxowa, nasemva kokuba icinyiwe.

total_balance_view.title: iBhalansi iyonke
total_balance_view.explanation: Bonisa ibhalansi epheleleyo yazo zonke iingxowa zakho kwisikrini sokujongela.

multisig.provide_signature_details: Sebenzisa isixhobo nengxowa yakho apho isitshixo sikhoyo ukutyikitya le ntengiselwano
multisig.provide_signature_details_bluewallet: Kwi-BlueWallet, yiya kwimenyu yesikrini se-Send kwaye ukhethe
multisig.provide_signature_next_steps_details: Xa ingxowa yakho ityikitye ngempumelelo i-transaction, skena iQR code enikiweyo okanye ungenise ifayile ekhutshelweyo, emva koko uphengulule zonke iinkcukacha ze-transaction phambi kokuyisasaza.
multisig.what_is_vault_description_to_spend:
ukuchitha kunye nesithathu onokukwazi
ukusisebenzisa njenge-backup.
multisig.invalid_cosigner_format: I-Co-signer engalunganga: Le ayisiyo i-co-signer ye-{format} format.
multisig.type_your_mnemonics: Faka i-seed ukungenisa isitshixo se-Vault esikhoyo.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub: Le yi-XPUB ye-co-signer—ilungele ukungeniswa kwenye ingxowa. Kukhuselekile ukuyabelana.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub_airdrop: Ukuba uyabelana nge-AirDrop abamkeli kufuneka babe kwisikrini sokulungelelanisa.
multisig.wallet_key_created: Isitshixo seVolthi yakho senziwe. Thabatha umzuzu ukugcina ngokukhuselekileyo imbewu yakho yokukhumbula.
multisig.are_you_sure_seed_will_be_lost: Uqinisekile? Imbewu yakho yokukhumbula iya kulahleka ukuba awunalo iqweqwe.
multisig.forget_this_seed: Libala le mbewu kwaye usebenzise i-XPUB endaweni yayo.
multisig.ms_help_title: Indlela ze-Multisig Vaults ezisebenza ngayo: Iingcebiso neeNcebo
multisig.ms_help_text: Ingxowa enezitshixo ezininzi, yokukhulisa ukhuseleko okanye ukulondoloza okwabelwene
multisig.ms_help_1: I-Vault iya kusebenza kunye nezinye iiapps ze-BlueWallet kunye neengxowa ezisebenzisana ne-PSBT, ezinje nge-Electrum, Specter, Coldcard, Cobo Vault, njl njl.
multisig.ms_help_2: Unganokwenza zonke izitshixo ze-Vault kwesi sixhobo kwaye uzisuse okanye uzihlele kamva. Ukuba zonke izitshixo zikwisixhobo esinye kunokhuseleko olufanayo nengxowa ye-Bitcoin eqhelekileyo.
multisig.ms_help_3: Kwiindlela zengxowa, uya kufumana i-backup ye-Vault yakho kunye ne-backup ye-watch-only. Le backup ifana ne-map kwingxowa yakho. Ibalulekile ekubuyiseleni ingxowa xa ulahlekelwa ngenye yee-seeds zakho.
multisig.ms_help_4: Ukungenisa i-multisig, sebenzisa ifayile yakho ye-backup kunye ne-feature ye-Import. Ukuba unee-seeds kunye nee-XPUBs kuphela, ungasebenzisa iqhosha le-Import elinye xa wenza izitshixo ze-Vault.
multisig.ms_help_5: Ngokwesiqhelo, i-BlueWallet iya kuvelisa i-Vault ye-2-of-3. Ukwenza i-quorum eyahlukileyo okanye utshintshe uhlobo lwedilesi, vula i-Advanced Mode kwiZicwangciso.

autofill_word.title: Igama lokugqibela le-Seed
autofill_word.error: Igalelo asilobinzana lembewu elinamagama ali-11 okanye angama-23. Nceda zama kwakhona.

cc.tip: Lo mphandle ukuvumela ubone, ufake ilebhile, u-freeze okanye ukhethe iicoins zolawulo olungcono lwengxowa. Unganokukhetha iicoins ezininzi ngokucofa kwiicircles ezinemibala.

addresses.sensitive_private_key: Isilumkiso: izitshixo zangasese zibuthathaka kakhulu. Qhubeka?
addresses.sign_help: Apha unokuyila okanye uqinisekise utyikityo lwecryptography olusekelwe kwidilesi ye-Bitcoin.

lnurl_auth.link_answer: I-Lightning wallet yakho inxulumaniswe ngempumelelo kwiakhawunti yakho kwi-{hostname}!
